name: Cheat Downloader Offline
description: A NextUI pak for downloading cheats from the Libretro github repo.
author: nborodikhin

changelog.v1.2.0: Suppress buttons on downloading screen, restore last position in lists (using unofficial builds of minui-list and minui-presenter).
changelog.v1.1.0: Use zip file for faster cheat extraction time (supportied by packed miniz).
